title: feat(alerts): implement AlertChannel interface and dispatcher core
body:
## 🎯 Context & Objective
We need a central dispatcher to process pending notifications, route them by channel type, and isolate errors so one failing channel doesn't block others.

## 📝 Implementation Plan
1. **Step 1**: Define AlertChannel interface with send(event: AlertEvent) method.
2. **Step 2**: Implement deliverPendingAlerts(db, network) in dispatcher.ts.
3. **Step 3**: Mark alerts as delivered on success, increment retry/failure counters on error.
4. **Step 4**: Ensure full isolation: if Webhook fails, Slack should still proceed.

title: feat(daemon): implement adaptive polling intervals
body:
## 🎯 Context & Objective
Replace static daemon intervals with adaptive cycles based on the remaining lifetime of watched contract entries.

## 📝 Implementation Plan
1. **Step 1**: Calculate next polling checks dynamically per contract.

title: feat(core): implement sequence number recovery
body:
